pr.body:
## Summary
- add reviewer config (`config/reviewer.yaml`) with `pdf_root`
- add reviewer endpoints: `review-data`, `source-pdf`, and `/review/{pack}/{release}` page
- add safe source PDF resolver constrained under `pdf_root`
- expose normalized artifact rows for human review (with `source_region_fingerprint`)
- update docs and API contract
- extend tests for reviewer API routes and resolver behavior

## Validation
- `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py'`

## Notes
- This phase is read-only reviewer UX (no writeback/override actions).
- Page-jump review only (no bbox overlay in this phase).

pr.body:
## Summary

- **Overlay geometry module** (`src/esh/overlay.py`): Classifies artifact bounding boxes as `exact`, `approximate`, or `missing`. Generates deterministic fallback bboxes for items lacking OCR geometry.
- **Per-page overlay endpoint** (`GET /review/overlay?page=N`): Returns all chunks, equations, and tables on a page with `bbox_status` and `overlay_bbox` fields ready for PDF rendering.
- **Correction draft capture** (`src/esh/corrections.py`): Append-only JSONL storage under `review/correction_drafts.jsonl`. `POST` to submit, `GET` to list. Canonical artifact files are never mutated.
- **Reviewer UI** (`GET /reviewer/{pack_id}/{release_version}`): Single-page HTML with artifact listing, bbox provenance badges, and overlay toggle for visual validation.

## Backward Compatibility

- All existing V1 endpoints are unchanged in shape and behavior.
- New fields (`bbox_status`, `overlay_bbox`) only appear in the `/review/overlay` endpoint.
- Correction endpoints are purely additive — no existing data is modified.
- No changes to the calculation path or canonical published artifacts.

## Schema Note

The `/review/overlay` response adds two new fields per artifact:
- `bbox_status`: `"exact"` | `"approximate"` | `"missing"`
- `overlay_bbox`: `[x0, y0, x1, y1]` in A4 point-space

These fields do not appear in any existing endpoint responses.

## Test plan

- [x] `test_overlay.py` — bbox_status classification (exact/approximate/missing), deterministic fallback, enrichment of all artifact types, page-level retrieval integration
- [x] `test_corrections.py` — validation rules, write/list JSONL round-trip, API endpoint POST/GET/422, no canonical file mutation
- [x] All 40 tests pass (8 new + 32 existing)
